name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Roommate from freshman year. We bonded over late-night study sessions and bad dining hall food. She moved to Vancouver after grad school.

name: Daniel Okafor
bio: Senior engineer who mentored me at my first job. Incredibly sharp and always willing to give honest feedback. We grab coffee virtually every few weeks.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Grew up two houses down from each other. We've stayed close despite living in different cities for the past eight years. Loves cooking and sends me recipes.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia in 2019. We still talk about that week in Chiang Mai. He's the person I call when I'm planning any trip.

name: Leila Hosseini
bio: We met at a local book club and immediately clicked over our shared obsession with literary fiction. She recommends at least one book a month that I end up loving.

name: Tom Pearce
bio: We were inseparable in college but drifted after moving to different states. Still have years of inside jokes and a shared love for bad sci-fi movies.

name: Anika Sharma
bio: Colleagues turned friends. We started working out together during the pandemic over video call and still keep each other accountable. One of the most disciplined people I know.

name: Carlos Reyes
bio: Our families have known each other for over a decade. He and I started hanging out independently as adults and found out we have way more in common than just our parents being friends.
